author: Aldo Giambuzzi
name: Masked Text Diffusion (Unlimited Compute)
blurb: Experimental 20-minute 8xH100 run for discrete text diffusion. Uses bidirectional attention, dynamic noise scaling (t), and INT6 quantization with selective pruning to hit 16MB. Evaluated via a custom 1/t-weighted Masked Reconstruction Score rather than standard causal BPB.
